'''Prisoner 677780''' was an intimidating prisoner at [[Dontamo Prison]]. No one tangled with him, and if anyone did, they would end up dead. He stole other prisoners' food on several occasions. When he tried to steal [[Ferus Olin]]'s who also was there as a prisoner, he failed and later tried to kill him. However, he was stopped because [[Clive Flax]], a friend of Ferus's, knocked Prisoner 677780 unconscious by throwing a datacard at him.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' {{1st}}
